title: Power of judges to sign orders and judgments while outside of the court's territorial jurisdiction
doc_html:
Art. 196.1. Power of judges to sign orders and judgments while outside of the court's territorial jurisdiction

            The judge of a district court or a court of limited jurisdiction may sign orders and judgments while outside of the court's territorial jurisdiction.

            Acts 2018, No. 275, §1; Acts 2021, No. 68, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2022.
doc_text:
Art. 196.1.  Power of judges to sign orders and judgments while outside of the court's
territorial jurisdiction
The judge of a district court or a court of limited jurisdiction may sign orders and
judgments while outside of the court's territorial jurisdiction.
Acts 2018, No. 275, §1; Acts 2021, No. 68, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2022.
